---
title: "AVSTC Seed Grant"
description: "Australia-Vietnam Strategic Technologies Centre (AVSTC)"
author: "Dinh Nguyen"
date: "2025-06-01"
image: avstc2025.png
draft: false
categories:
  - funding
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
comments:
  utterances: 
    repo: https://github.com/icclabo/icc
    label: avstc2025
---

Our project, entitled ''NextGShield - Proactive AI Resilience in NextG Open Wireless'', was funded by the Australia-Vietnam Strategic Technologies Centre (AVSTC).

The project tackles a key challenge in next-generation wireless networks: the instability of AI/ML models under dynamic environments and adversarial conditions. To address this, it develops NextGShield, a lightweight and resilient framework that combines robust model design, adversarial training, adaptive learning, and real-time anomaly detection. By incorporating statistical methods to detect distribution shifts and enabling efficient on-the-fly adaptation, the framework improves model reliability without requiring full retraining. Experimental results in realistic wireless settings demonstrate enhanced robustness and adaptability, contributing to more secure and trustworthy AI-driven systems for future 6G and Open RAN networks.


<!--
> Intelligence, Computing & Communication Lab: Advancing an Interdisciplinary
Program of Research

{{< pdf Girard_TT_Slides.pdf width=600 height=400 image_width=600 image_border=1 image=firstslide.png >}}
-->
